description: Slang time references: 'crack of dawn' resolved to 7 AM (confirmed explicitly), 'lunchtime' resolved to noon. Two events on Monday.

events.title: Standup
events.reasoning: Alice mentions standup at 'the crack of dawn' and immediately clarifies '7am'. Monday standup at 7 AM confirmed by both.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 30 minutes as standard for standup meetings.

events.title: Team Lunch
events.reasoning: Dave proposes 'lunchtime, like noon' and Alice confirms noon on Monday at the deli on fifth.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour for a team lunch.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events on Monday: standup at 7 AM and team lunch at noon at the deli on fifth.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday = 2026-02-23. 'Crack of dawn' is clarified as 7 AM in conversation. 'Lunchtime'/'noon' = 12:00 PM.
